nodes.recentposition: Product Manager Intern at CMRubinWorld, Remote
nodes.bios: Heyo!!! My name is Alex Pham, and I initiated fall quarter of my first year. I'm really interested in product management and currently studying Business Information Management with a minor in Philosophy. Outside of school I love working on my car, hiking, and reading! Ask me about my love for finding new hobbies, various philisophical ideas, or anything really :)
